frozen_candidate.title: Probing Sign-Changing Order Parameters via Impurity States in unconventional superconductors
frozen_candidate.match: general T-matrix and d-wave sign-cancellation narrative only

direct_formula_source.title: Impurity-induced states in conventional and unconventional superconductors
direct_formula_source.match: pole condition, normalized local Green function, and logarithmic pole formula

source_contract.reason: No recovered PRL source satisfies the benchmark identity; the closest 2025 PRB cites the older 2006 RMP that actually contains the frozen formulas.

task_2.caveat: The cutoff constant and printed imaginary-part sign differ between the frozen answer and the RMP convention; off-diagonal cancellation is exact only under the stated C4-symmetric integration/patch contract.

task_3.reason: The frozen number is only the real part of a fixed-log approximation, does not solve G0(Omega)=c, discards a width larger than the energy, and is called exact outside the controlled log>>1 regime.
